17	package plugins
18	
19	import "fmt"
20	
21	const (
22		// PluginName for NodeAffinityScoring.
23		NodeAffinityScoringPluginName = "NodeAffinityScoring"
24	)
25	
26	// NodeAffinityScoring is the plugin that implements the ScorePlugin interface.
27	type NodeAffinityScoring struct {
28		BasePlugin `json:",inline"`
29	
30		// Platforms is a required field and must contain at least one entry.
31		// +kubebuilder:validation:MinItems=1
32		Platforms []NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm `json:"platforms" protobuf:"bytes,2,opt,name=platforms"`
33	}
34	
35	// ValidateArchitecturesSet checks whether duplicate architectures are set in NodeAffinityScoring
36	func (n *NodeAffinityScoring) ValidateArchitecturesSet() (bool, error) {
37		seen := make(map[string]struct{})
38		for _, term := range n.Platforms {
39			if _, exists := seen[term.Architecture]; exists {
40				return false, fmt.Errorf("duplicate architecture %q found in nodeAffinityScoring.platforms", term.Architecture)
41			}
42	
43			seen[term.Architecture] = struct{}{}
44		}
45		return true, nil
46	}
47	
48	// NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm holds configuration for specific platforms, with required fields validated.
49	type NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm struct {
50		// Architecture must be a list of non-empty string of arch names.
51		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=arm64;amd64;ppc64le;s390x
52		Architecture string `json:"architecture" protobuf:"bytes,1,rep,name=architecture"`
53	
54		// weight associated with matching the corresponding NodeAffinityScoringPlatformTerm,
55		// in the range 1-100.
56		// +kubebuilder:validation:Minimum:=1
57		// +kubebuilder:validation:Maximum:=100
58		Weight int32 `json:"weight" protobuf:"bytes,3,rep,name=weight"`
59	}
60	
61	// Name returns the name of the NodeAffinityScoringPluginName.
62	func (b *NodeAffinityScoring) Name() string {
63		return NodeAffinityScoringPluginName
64	}

17	package v1beta1
18	
19	import (
20		"fmt"
21		"strings"
22	
23		metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
24	
25		"github.com/openshift/library-go/pkg/operator/v1helpers"
26	
27		"github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common"
28		"github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common/plugins"
29	)
30	
31	// ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec defines the desired state of ClusterPodPlacementConfig
32	type ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec struct {
33		// LogVerbosity is the log level for the pod placement components.
34		// Valid values are: "Normal", "Debug", "Trace", "TraceAll".
35		// Defaults to "Normal".
36		// +optional
37		// +kubebuilder:default=Normal
38		LogVerbosity common.LogVerbosityLevel `json:"logVerbosity,omitempty"`
39	
40		// NamespaceSelector selects the namespaces where the pod placement operand can process the nodeAffinity
41		// of the pods. If left empty, all the namespaces are considered.
42		// The default sample allows to exclude all the namespaces where the
43		// label "multiarch.openshift.io/exclude-pod-placement" exists.
44		// +optional
45		NamespaceSelector *metav1.LabelSelector `json:"namespaceSelector,omitempty"`
46	
47		// Plugins defines the configurable plugins for this component.
48		// This field is optional and will be omitted from the output if not set.
49		// +optional
50		Plugins *plugins.Plugins `json:"plugins,omitempty"`
51	
52		// FallbackArchitecture defines the architecture to use if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.
53		// If configured, the PodPlacementController will set the node affinity of the pod to the fallback architecture
54		// if the image inspector cannot determine the image's architecture.
55		// +optional
56		// +kubebuilder:default=""
57		// +kubebuilder:validation:Enum=arm64;amd64;ppc64le;s390x;""
58		FallbackArchitecture string `json:"fallbackArchitecture,omitempty"`
59	}
60	
61	// ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus defines the observed state of ClusterPodPlacementConfig
62	type ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus struct {
63		// Conditions represents the latest available observations of a ClusterPodPlacementConfig's current state.
64		Conditions []metav1.Condition `json:"conditions,omitempty"`
65	
66		// The following fields are used to derive the conditions. They are not exposed to the user.
67		//nolint:revive // controller-gen requires json tags on all fields, even unexported ones
68		available                                bool `json:"-"`
69		progressing                              bool `json:"-"`
70		degraded                                 bool `json:"-"`
71		deprovisioning                           bool `json:"-"`
72		podPlacementControllerNotReady           bool `json:"-"`
73		podPlacementWebhookNotReady              bool `json:"-"`
74		mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable bool `json:"-"`
75		canDeployMutatingWebhook                 bool `json:"-"`
76	}
77	
78	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsReady() bool {
79		return s.available
80	}
81	
82	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsProgressing() bool {
83		return s.progressing
84	}
85	
86	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsDegraded() bool {
87		return s.degraded
88	}
89	
90	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsDeprovisioning() bool {
91		return s.deprovisioning
92	}
93	
94	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsPodPlacementControllerNotReady() bool {
95		return s.podPlacementControllerNotReady
96	}
97	
98	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsPodPlacementWebhookNotReady() bool {
99		return s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady
100	}
101	
102	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) IsMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable() bool {
103		return s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable
104	}
105	
106	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) CanDeployMutatingWebhook() bool {
107		return s.canDeployMutatingWebhook
108	}
109	
110	// Build sets the conditions in the ClusterPodPlacementConfig object.
111	// The build Conditions are:
112	//   - Degraded: if some components are not available (no replicas) and the object is not deprovisioning
113	//   - Deprovisioning: if the object is being deleted
114	//   - MutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: if the mutating webhook configuration does not exist
115	//   - PodPlacementControllerNotReady: if the pod placement controller is not available or up-to-date
116	//   - PodPlacementWebhookNotReady: if the pod placement webhook is not available or up-to-date
117	//   - Progressing: if the object is not deprovisioning and some of the components are not up-to-date.
118	//   - Available: if all the components are available to serve the requests and reconcile node affinities (at least one replica).
119	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) Build(
120		podPlacementControllerAvailable, podPlacementWebhookAvailable,
121		podPlacementControllerUpToDate, podPlacementWebhookUpToDate,
122		mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable,
123		deprovisioning bool) {
124		s.deprovisioning = deprovisioning
125		// tracks existence of the mutating webhook configuration
126		s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable = !mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable
127		// tracks the availability of the pod placement controller and webhook and if they are up to date
128		s.podPlacementControllerNotReady = !podPlacementControllerAvailable || !podPlacementControllerUpToDate
129		s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady = !podPlacementWebhookAvailable || !podPlacementWebhookUpToDate
130		// if all the components exist and have at least one replica ready
131		s.available = mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable && podPlacementWebhookAvailable && podPlacementControllerAvailable
132		// if some components are not available (no replicas)
133		s.degraded = !s.available && !s.deprovisioning // degraded will not track deprovisioning
134		// allow the deployment of the mutating webhook configuration if the pod placement controller and webhook are available
135		// (at least one replica)
136		s.canDeployMutatingWebhook = podPlacementWebhookAvailable && podPlacementControllerAvailable && !s.deprovisioning
137		s.progressing = (!podPlacementControllerUpToDate || !podPlacementWebhookUpToDate || !mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable) && !s.deprovisioning
138		s.buildConditions()
139	}
140	
141	func (s *ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus) buildConditions() {
142		if s.Conditions == nil {
143			s.Conditions = []metav1.Condition{}
144		}
145		reason := ""
146		if s.podPlacementControllerNotReady {
147			reason += PodPlacementControllerNotRolledOutType
148		}
149		if s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady {
150			reason += PodPlacementWebhookNotRolledOutType
151		}
152		if s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable {
153			reason += MutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable
154		}
155		if reason == "" {
156			reason = AllComponentsReady
157		}
158		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
159			Type:    AvailableType,
160			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.available),
161			Reason:  reason,
162			Message: fmt.Sprintf(ReadyMsg, notFromBool(s.available), strings.TrimSpace(notFromBool(s.available))),
163		})
164		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
165			Type:    ProgressingType,
166			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.progressing),
167			Reason:  reason,
168			Message: fmt.Sprintf(ProgressingMsg, notFromBool(s.progressing)),
169		})
170		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
171			Type:    DegradedType,
172			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.degraded),
173			Reason:  fmt.Sprintf("%s%s", trimAndCapitalize(notFromBool(s.degraded)), DegradedType),
174			Message: fmt.Sprintf(DegradedMsg, notFromBool(s.degraded)),
175		})
176		deprovisinoingMessagePostfix := ""
177		if s.deprovisioning {
178			deprovisinoingMessagePostfix = PendingDeprovisioningMsg
179		}
180		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
181			Type:    DeprovisioningType,
182			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.deprovisioning),
183			Reason:  fmt.Sprintf("%s%s", trimAndCapitalize(notFromBool(s.deprovisioning)), DeprovisioningType),
184			Message: fmt.Sprintf(DeprovisioningMsg, notFromBool(s.deprovisioning), deprovisinoingMessagePostfix),
185		})
186		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
187			Type:    PodPlacementControllerNotRolledOutType,
188			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.podPlacementControllerNotReady),
189			Reason:  fmt.Sprintf("PodPlacementController%sReady", trimAndCapitalize(notFromBool(!s.podPlacementControllerNotReady))),
190			Message: fmt.Sprintf(PodPlacementControllerRolledOutMsg, notFromBool(!s.podPlacementControllerNotReady)),
191		})
192		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
193			Type:    PodPlacementWebhookNotRolledOutType,
194			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady),
195			Reason:  fmt.Sprintf("PodPlacementWebhook%sReady", trimAndCapitalize(notFromBool(!s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady))),
196			Message: fmt.Sprintf(PodPlacementWebhookRolledOutMsg, notFromBool(!s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady)),
197		})
198		v1helpers.SetCondition(&s.Conditions, metav1.Condition{
199			Type:    MutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable,
200			Status:  conditionFromBool(s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable),
201			Reason:  reason,
202			Message: fmt.Sprintf(MutatingWebhookConfigurationReadyMsg, notFromBool(!s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable)),
203		})
204	}
205	
206	// ClusterPodPlacementConfig defines the configuration for the architecture aware pod placement operand.
207	// Users can only deploy a single object named "cluster".
208	// Creating the object enables the operand.
209	// +kubebuilder:object:root=true
210	// +kubebuilder:storageversion
211	// +kubebuilder:subresource:status
212	// +kubebuilder:resource:path=clusterpodplacementconfigs,scope=Cluster
213	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=Available,JSONPath=.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Available")].status,type=string
214	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=Progressing,JSONPath=.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Progressing")].status,type=string
215	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=Degraded,JSONPath=.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Degraded")].status,type=string
216	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=Since,JSONPath=.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Progressing")].lastTransitionTime,type=date
217	// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=Status,JSONPath=.status.conditions[?(@.type=="Available")].reason,type=string
218	type ClusterPodPlacementConfig struct {
219		metav1.TypeMeta   `json:",inline"`
220		metav1.ObjectMeta `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
221	
222		Spec   ClusterPodPlacementConfigSpec   `json:"spec,omitempty"`
223		Status ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus `json:"status,omitempty"`
224	}
225	
226	func (c *ClusterPodPlacementConfig) PluginsEnabled(plugin common.Plugin) bool {
227		if c.Spec.Plugins != nil {
228			return c.Spec.Plugins.PluginEnabled(plugin)
229		}
230		return false
231	}
232	
233	//+kubebuilder:object:root=true
234	
235	// ClusterPodPlacementConfigList contains a list of ClusterPodPlacementConfig
236	type ClusterPodPlacementConfigList struct {
237		metav1.TypeMeta `json:",inline"`
238		metav1.ListMeta `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
239		Items           []ClusterPodPlacementConfig `json:"items"`
240	}
241	
242	func conditionFromBool(b bool) metav1.ConditionStatus {
243		if b {
244			return metav1.ConditionTrue
245		}
246		return metav1.ConditionFalse
247	}
248	
249	func notFromBool(b bool) string {
250		if b {
251			return ""
252		}
253		return "not "
254	}
255	
256	func trimAndCapitalize(s string) string {
257		trimmed := strings.TrimSpace(s)
258		if len(trimmed) == 0 {
259			return trimmed
260		}
261		return strings.ToUpper(string(trimmed[0])) + trimmed[1:]
262	}
263

1	package v1beta1
2	
3	import (
4		"testing"
5	
6		v1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
7	)
8	
9	func Test_conditionFromBool(t *testing.T) {
10		type args struct {
11			b bool
12		}
13		tests := []struct {
14			name string
15			args args
16			want v1.ConditionStatus
17		}{
18			{
19				name: "Test conditionFromBool with true",
20				args: args{b: true},
21				want: v1.ConditionTrue,
22			},
23			{
24				name: "Test conditionFromBool with false",
25				args: args{b: false},
26				want: v1.ConditionFalse,
27			},
28		}
29		for _, tt := range tests {
30			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
31				if got := conditionFromBool(tt.args.b); got != tt.want {
32					t.Errorf("conditionFromBool() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
33				}
34			})
35		}
36	}
37	
38	func Test_notFromBool(t *testing.T) {
39		type args struct {
40			b bool
41		}
42		tests := []struct {
43			name string
44			args args
45			want string
46		}{
47			{
48				name: "Test notFromBool with true",
49				args: args{b: true},
50				want: "",
51			},
52			{
53				name: "Test notFromBool with false",
54				args: args{b: false},
55				want: "not ",
56			},
57		}
58		for _, tt := range tests {
59			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
60				if got := notFromBool(tt.args.b); got != tt.want {
61					t.Errorf("notFromBool() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
62				}
63			})
64		}
65	}
66	
67	func Test_trimAndCapitalize(t *testing.T) {
68		type args struct {
69			s string
70		}
71		tests := []struct {
72			name string
73			args args
74			want string
75		}{
76			{
77				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with empty string",
78				args: args{s: ""},
79				want: "",
80			},
81			{
82				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with single character",
83				args: args{s: "a"},
84				want: "A",
85			},
86			{
87				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with multiple characters",
88				args: args{s: "abc"},
89				want: "Abc",
90			},
91			{
92				name: "Test trimAndCapitalize with multiple characters and spaces",
93				args: args{s: "  ab c  "},
94				want: "Ab c",
95			},
96		}
97		for _, tt := range tests {
98			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
99				if got := trimAndCapitalize(tt.args.s); got != tt.want {
100					t.Errorf("trimAndCapitalize() = %v, want %v", got, tt.want)
101				}
102			})
103		}
104	}
105	
106	func TestClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus_Build(t *testing.T) {
107		tests := []struct {
108			name                                           string
109			podPlacementControllerAvailable                bool
110			podPlacementWebhookAvailable                   bool
111			podPlacementControllerUpToDate                 bool
112			podPlacementWebhookUpToDate                    bool
113			mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable          bool
114			deprovisioning                                 bool
115			expectDegraded                                 bool
116			expectDeprovisioning                           bool
117			expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable bool
118			expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady           bool
119			expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady              bool
120			expectAvailable                                bool
121			expectProgressing                              bool
122			expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook                 bool
123		}{
124			{
125				name:                                           "Deprovisioning",
126				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
127				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
128				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
129				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
130				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
131				deprovisioning:                                 true,
132				expectDegraded:                                 false,
133				expectDeprovisioning:                           true,
134				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
135				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
136				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
137				expectAvailable:                                true,
138				expectProgressing:                              false,
139				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 false,
140			},
141			{
142				name:                                           "AllAvailableAndUpToDate",
143				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
144				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
145				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
146				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
147				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
148				deprovisioning:                                 false,
149				expectDegraded:                                 false,
150				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
151				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
152				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
153				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
154				expectAvailable:                                true,
155				expectProgressing:                              false,
156				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
157			},
158			{
159				name:                                           "MutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable",
160				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
161				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
162				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
163				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
164				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          false,
165				deprovisioning:                                 false,
166				expectDegraded:                                 true,
167				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
168				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: true,
169				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
170				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
171				expectAvailable:                                false,
172				expectProgressing:                              true,
173				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
174			},
175			{
176				name:                                           "PodPlacementControllerNotAvailable",
177				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                false,
178				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
179				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 false,
180				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    true,
181				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
182				deprovisioning:                                 false,
183				expectDegraded:                                 true,
184				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
185				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
186				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           true,
187				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              false,
188				expectAvailable:                                false,
189				expectProgressing:                              true,
190				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 false,
191			},
192			{
193				name:                                           "PodPlacementWebhookNotUpToDate",
194				podPlacementControllerAvailable:                true,
195				podPlacementWebhookAvailable:                   true,
196				podPlacementControllerUpToDate:                 true,
197				podPlacementWebhookUpToDate:                    false,
198				mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable:          true,
199				deprovisioning:                                 false,
200				expectDegraded:                                 false,
201				expectDeprovisioning:                           false,
202				expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable: false,
203				expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady:           false,
204				expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady:              true,
205				expectAvailable:                                true,
206				expectProgressing:                              true,
207				expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook:                 true,
208			},
209		}
210	
211		for _, tt := range tests {
212			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
213				s := &ClusterPodPlacementConfigStatus{}
214				s.Build(
215					tt.podPlacementControllerAvailable,
216					tt.podPlacementWebhookAvailable,
217					tt.podPlacementControllerUpToDate,
218					tt.podPlacementWebhookUpToDate,
219					tt.mutatingWebhookConfigurationAvailable,
220					tt.deprovisioning,
221				)
222	
223				if s.degraded != tt.expectDegraded {
224					t.Errorf("degraded = %v, expected %v", s.degraded, tt.expectDegraded)
225				}
226				if s.deprovisioning != tt.expectDeprovisioning {
227					t.Errorf("deprovisioning = %v, expected %v", s.deprovisioning, tt.expectDeprovisioning)
228				}
229				if s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable != tt.expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable {
230					t.Errorf("mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable = %v, expected %v", s.mutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable, tt.expectMutatingWebhookConfigurationNotAvailable)
231				}
232				if s.podPlacementControllerNotReady != tt.expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady {
233					t.Errorf("podPlacementControllerNotReady = %v, expected %v", s.podPlacementControllerNotReady, tt.expectPodPlacementControllerNotReady)
234				}
235				if s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady != tt.expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady {
236					t.Errorf("podPlacementWebhookNotReady = %v, expected %v", s.podPlacementWebhookNotReady, tt.expectPodPlacementWebhookNotReady)
237				}
238				if s.available != tt.expectAvailable {
239					t.Errorf("available = %v, expected %v", s.available, tt.expectAvailable)
240				}
241				if s.progressing != tt.expectProgressing {
242					t.Errorf("progressing = %v, expected %v", s.progressing, tt.expectProgressing)
243				}
244				if s.canDeployMutatingWebhook != tt.expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook {
245					t.Errorf("canDeployMutatingWebhook = %v, expected %v", s.canDeployMutatingWebhook, tt.expectCanDeployMutatingWebhook)
246				}
247			})
248		}
249	}
250

17	package plugins
18	
19	import "github.com/openshift/multiarch-tuning-operator/api/common"
20	
21	// +k8s:deepcopy-gen=package
22	
23	// LocalPlugins represents the plugins configuration for podplacementconfigs resource.
24	// +kubebuilder:object:generate=true
25	type LocalPlugins struct {
26		NodeAffinityScoring *NodeAffinityScoring `json:"nodeAffinityScoring,omitempty"`
27	}
28	
29	// localPluginChecks is a map that associates a plugin name with a function that can
30	// safely check if that specific plugin is enabled on a LocalPlugins struct.
31	var localPluginChecks = map[common.Plugin]func(lp *LocalPlugins) bool{
32		common.NodeAffinityScoringPluginName: func(lp *LocalPlugins) bool {
33			return lp.NodeAffinityScoring != nil && lp.NodeAffinityScoring.IsEnabled()
34		},
35	}
36	
37	// PluginEnabled provides a generic and safe way to check if a specific plugin is enabled.
38	// It handles the case where the LocalPlugins struct itself is nil.
39	func (lp *LocalPlugins) PluginEnabled(plugin common.Plugin) bool {
40		if checkFunc, found := localPluginChecks[plugin]; found {
41			return checkFunc(lp)
42		}
43		return false
44	}
45	
46	// Plugins represents the plugins configuration for cluster pod placement config.
47	// +kubebuilder:object:generate=true
48	type Plugins struct {
49		NodeAffinityScoring *NodeAffinityScoring `json:"nodeAffinityScoring,omitempty"`
50	
51		ExecFormatErrorMonitor *ExecFormatErrorMonitor `json:"execFormatErrorMonitor,omitempty"`
52	}
53	
54	// pluginChecks is a map that associates a plugin name with a function that can
55	// safely check if that specific plugin is enabled on a Plugins struct.
56	var pluginChecks = map[common.Plugin]func(p *Plugins) bool{
57		common.NodeAffinityScoringPluginName: func(p *Plugins) bool {
58			return p.NodeAffinityScoring != nil && p.NodeAffinityScoring.IsEnabled()
59		},
60		common.ExecFormatErrorMonitorPluginName: func(p *Plugins) bool {
61			return p.ExecFormatErrorMonitor != nil && p.ExecFormatErrorMonitor.IsEnabled()
62		},
63	}
64	
65	// PluginEnabled provides a generic and safe way to check if a specific plugin is enabled.
66	// It handles the case where the Plugins struct itself is nil.
67	func (p *Plugins) PluginEnabled(plugin common.Plugin) bool {
68		if checkFunc, found := pluginChecks[plugin]; found {
69			return checkFunc(p)
70		}
71		return false
72	}
73	
74	// IBasePlugin defines a basic interface for plugins.
75	// +k8s:deepcopy-gen=false
76	type IBasePlugin interface {
77		// Enabled is a required boolean field.
78		IsEnabled() bool
79		// PluginName returns the name of the plugin.
80		Name() string
81	}
82	
83	// BasePlugin defines basic structure of a plugin
84	type BasePlugin struct {
85		// Enabled indicates whether the plugin is enabled.
86		// +kubebuilder:"validation:Required"
87		Enabled bool `json:"enabled" protobuf:"varint,1,opt,name=enabled" kubebuilder:"validation:Required"`
88	}
89	
90	// Name returns the name of the BasePlugin.
91	func (b *BasePlugin) Name() string {
92		return "BasePlugin"
93	}
94	
95	// IsEnabled returns the value of the Enabled field.
96	func (b *BasePlugin) IsEnabled() bool {
97		return b.Enabled
98	}
99
